name: Yogurt-Dill Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix together the plain low-fat yogurt, crushed dill weed, finely chopped onion, dry mustard, lemon juice, and garlic powder.
2. Stir until all ingredients are well combined.
3. Cover and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes before serving to allow flavors to develop.
Serve over tossed green salad.
